description: Prestige for men from jaguar has a stylish flask designed by Thierry de Baschmakoff. This masculine fragrance opens with notes of bergamot, Sicilian lemon, Italian mandarin and frozen pear. The heart follows with tones of pink pepper, cardamom, black pepper, nutmeg, birch leaf, coriander and fir. Base notes are olibanum, sandalwood, Virginian cedar, vetiver, labdanum, musk and patchouli. Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
